opening_range.definition: high/low of the first 5-minute candle (9:30-9:35 ET)
opening_range.bot_note: high/low over first 5 one-minute candles is mathematically identical — audit gap #9 was a false alarm

reference_levels.treatment: levels are AREAS not lines; wicks may pierce, closes decide
reference_levels.principle: wicks do the damage, bodies tell the story — use closes for structure, wicks for liquidity sweeps

confluence.htf_direction: 1h (scalper) / 4h (day trade) trend must align before 1-min execution
confluence.relative_strength: symbol vs SPY/QQQ — community A-setups repeatedly cite RS as the deciding filter; skip longs when indices are weak
confluence.confluence_stack: order block + PML/PDH coinciding = strongest zones (repeated in course + community posts)

entry_conditions: candle CLOSES through level with displacement (impulsive candle, body >= 1.5x avg of prior 5)
retest touches level or the FVG left by displacement
confirmation candle closes back in breakout direction
named pattern at retest: hammer/engulfing (bullish), shooting star/engulfing (bearish)
break_and_retest.stop_placement: below breakout level (bot) / break of entry candle (Scarface video) — level stop is wider and survives wick noise
break_and_retest.no_trade: never inside the box/range; skip slow, hesitant breaks ('undecided candles' — community loss reports cite these)
break_and_retest.targets: 2R fixed; scale 25-50% at HOD/first major level, trail runner behind new order blocks
break_and_retest.claimed_stats: 69% WR, 2.58 PF (29 trades / 2 months, Scarface backtest)

order_block.logic: LAST opposite-close candle before the leg that breaks structure (HH for bullish, LL for bearish)
order_block.market_structure_context: requires clear trend (HH/HL or LH/LL); invalid once any close through the block
entry_rules: wait for retrace into block; wick-only touch = strongest, full body fill = weakest
entry models: top-of-block (aggressive), middle, confirmation-candle close back through (safest — community standard: 'confirmation candle entry with SL above/below block')
stop just beyond block extreme; trail stop behind each NEW order block as trade runs (course lesson 1450464)

rule_of_84.statistic: identical setup re-presenting works ~84% of the time after a first stop-out
pre_check_questions: Did the stop-out break the trend/structure?
Was the stop too tight in hindsight?
Would the exact same trade still work? (must be EXACT same conditions — course emphasizes repeatedly)
re_entry_conditions: candle CLOSE reclaims the exact original entry level
same stop, same target as first attempt
skip if price already near HOD/LOD (RR gone)

opening_range.method: mark first 5-min candle (9:30-9:35) high/low; provides day's first S/R box
entry_rules: trade edges only — break + retest of OR high (long) / OR low (short)
community pattern: 'wick retests 5min range, enter on 2nd confirming candle'
5min reclaim entry valid when clean retest never comes

A+.criteria: named pattern (hammer) at PDH/PDL-class level + HTF aligned + displacement context

A.criteria: engulfing at key level + HTF aligned

B.criteria: strong PA (large wick) at key level, HTF neutral

C.criteria: weak PA but structure supports; alert-only, no auto-trade

risk.min_stop_filter: skip if stock risk < 0.5% of price AND est premium risk < $0.20
risk.friday: community practice: half size on Fridays

no_trade_zones: middle of previous day range / inside opening-range box
all reference levels within 0.5% of each other (consolidation)

implemented: key-level stops (SPEC1): B&R=OR level, order block=block extreme, 84%=reclaim level
A-D grading with size scaling + C alert-only + 3/day cap (SPEC2)
structural order blocks with retest classes + structure gate (SPEC3)
min-stop filter, consolidation skip, 2-loss halt, Tastytrade real-time
true prior-day PDH/PDL via daily DXLink candles as second B&R level pair (2026-07-04)
HTF 1h trend bias (close vs 20SMA) gating grades: opposed=D, neutral caps at B (2026-07-04)
gaps_open: displacement gate (body >= 1.5x avg) on B&R breaks
84% pre-check questions (bot only checks reclaim + not-near-HOD)
trail stops behind new order blocks (bot is signal-only, no management)
